title: abutilon albidum
intro: Abutilon albidum, also known as White Flowered Indian Mallow or White Hairy Mallow, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon albidum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Abutilon albidum is used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
